description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, dark wooden handle with a natural, slightly curved shape, giving it an ergonomic grip. The handle appears weathered and textured, suggesting frequent use or exposure to the elements. The axe head is made of solid metal, with a rectangular blade that is thick and heavy, designed for chopping or splitting. The blade has a matte, dark finish and a broad cutting edge, with a flat poll on the opposite side for striking. The mounting of the blade to the handle is traditional, with the head fitted securely onto the end of the wooden shaft. No visible markings, engravings, or labels are present on either the handle or the blade.
description: A rugged hand axe with a curved, textured wooden handle and a thick, rectangular metal blade. The axe shows signs of wear and is designed for chopping or splitting tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the broad, rectangular metal blade.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the thickness of the blade and the end of the handle, with the blade edge facing forward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's curvature and the flat poll of the blade.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the blade and the handle's attachment point.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, textured wooden handle with an oval cross-section and natural ergonomic grip.
attribute_blade_design: Rectangular, thick metal blade with a broad single cutting edge and a flat poll; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the end of the wooden handle.
